𝐇𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠: 𝐉𝐮𝐧𝐢𝐨𝐫 𝐔𝐀𝐓 𝐓𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫 (𝐁𝐚𝐧𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠)
AMK Technology is currently looking for a Junior UAT Tester to support a banking project based in Jakarta.
Position: Junior UAT Tester

𝐑𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬:
Experience in User Acceptance Testing (UAT), preferably within the banking industry
Hands-on experience testing Mobile Banking and/or Payment applications
Good communication skills in English (mandatory)
Strong attention to detail and ability to work closely with business users and project teams

𝐄𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐲𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐃𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬:
Contract Duration: 3 months
Location: Onsite, Central Jakarta
Start Date: ASAP (latest joining date: 3 August)

📩 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐫 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞?
👉 WhatsApp: +60129678650
📧 Email: jeffrey@amktechnology.com
Feel free to share this opportunity with your network if you know someone who may be suitable for this role.

🚀 We're Hiring | Associate – Master Data Management 🚀
📍 Experience: 0–2 Years
🎓 Qualification: Graduate
🗣️ English: Intermediate to Advanced

Key Skills Required:
✅ Master Data Management
✅ SAP / ERP (Basic Knowledge)
✅ MS Excel (VLOOKUP, Formulas, Functions)
✅ SQL
✅ Python (Basic)
✅ Data Validation & Data Cleansing
✅ MS Outlook & Microsoft Teams
✅ Good Typing Speed
✅ Strong Communication Skills

Job Responsibilities:
Process Customer/Vendor Master Data requests (Create, Update, Block, Archive).
Maintain and update master data in SAP/ERP systems.
Perform data cleansing and enrichment activities.
Ensure data accuracy and meet defined KPIs.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support business operations.
📩 Interested candidates can share their updated resume at [ankita@frontier.in] or DM me for more details.

In this week's spotlight: Cohesity 🤝 NVIDIA

This week did not disappoint! We're at NVIDIA GTC showing what's possible when your AI tools finally have access to the data they've been missing all along. Cohesity Gaia makes that happen, no new pipelines, no duplicating data, no rebuilding permissions from scratch. Your data was already there. We just unlocked it. 🔓

And the agents doing all that work? They run inside NVIDIA OpenShell so they can't be turned into the very thing they're fighting against.

Come find us at booth #3003 before it wraps tomorrow. 👇

🎉 One Year at Cognizant – A Journey of Learning, Growth, and Gratitude
Today marks one year since I joined Cognizant, and I'm grateful for everything this journey has taught me.
Every experience, whether challenging or rewarding, has played a role in shaping my professional growth. During my initial project, although I had limited opportunities to work on live tasks, I used that time to strengthen my technical knowledge, complete trainings, and prepare myself for future responsibilities.
The next phase of my journey brought me into Security Operations, where I have been working as a SOC Analyst. Over the past several months, I've gained hands-on experience in security monitoring, alert triage, incident response, and working with Cortex XSIAM. This experience has significantly enhanced my technical skills, confidence, and understanding of cybersecurity operations.
A heartfelt thank you to all my managers, team leads, mentors, and teammates who supported, guided, and encouraged me throughout this journey. Your trust and mentorship have been invaluable.
As I step into my second year, I'm excited to continue learning, take on new challenges, deepen my expertise in cybersecurity, AI, and automation, and contribute even more to my team and organization.
Thank you, Cognizant, for an incredible first year. Here's to many more milestones ahead! 🚀
#OneYearAtCognizant #Gratitude #SOCAnalyst #CyberSecurity #Learning #Growth #CortexXSIAM #IncidentResponse #BlueTeam #CareerJourney #Cognizant

Private vs Government Job 😊😊

Private: Layoffs anytime.
Government: Job Security.

Private: More responsibility, more innovation.
Government: lunch ke baad aana + Job Security.

Private: Higher salary, higher BP.
Government: Public service fees accepted separately + Job Security.

Private: Work till 11 PM, get pizza.
Government: Leave at 5 PM, get + Job Security.

Private: Performance-based growth.
Government: Age-based promotion. + Job Security.

Not saying which is better... your views ?



Do you agree ?
